overview: A highly creative and unique developer portfolio for Alex Rivera, featuring a light pastel theme, playful typography, floating animated elements, parallax scrolling, and interactive hover effects across all sections including Hero, About storytelling journey, Skills, Projects showcase, Experience timeline, and Contact form.
features: Creative light pastel theme with soft gradients and shadows
Animated hero section with floating geometric shapes and scroll indicator
Storytelling About section with animated journey milestone cards
Interactive skills section with hover reveal and creative icon arrangement
Rich project showcase with hover reveal animations and tech stack badges
Animated experience timeline with scroll-triggered entrance effects
Elegant contact form with floating label inputs and social links
Parallax scrolling and floating elements throughout
Fully responsive with SEO optimization and accessibility support
